meaning: n.<美俚>日本女人(尤指妓女)
examples: Is this conjunct music, step-wise music, or jumpy, skippy music?
Monica, you think Skippy liked you?
One easy example here would be Skippy peanut butter.
In the 1970s, she made commercials for Skippy peanut butter, appearing with her real-life children.
Commentator Bob Knight is the cranky old neighbor that most likely disposed of your family pet Skippy.
